category_title: Students with non-compliant behavior and difficulty accepting instructions
minimal_context: The student is sitting at a desk to complete independent work using a textbook and a worksheet.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for your independent work. Please open your textbook and complete the worksheet.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Makes loud humming noises and stares at the wall) I don't care about this.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Continues humming loudly and taps his pencil on the desk) When is lunch?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the textbook away and turns his back) No! Leave me alone!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for your independent work. Please open your textbook and complete the worksheet.

STUDENT: (Makes loud humming noises and stares at the wall) I don't care about this.

TUTOR: You need to start working.

STUDENT: (Continues humming loudly and taps his pencil on the desk) When is lunch?

TUTOR: Please look at the worksheet.

STUDENT: (Pushes the textbook away and turns his back) No! Leave me alone!

task.content: independent work involving typical textbook and worksheet tasks

challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: No response or negative verbal or nonverbal response to adult initiation

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: noise-making or off-task statements in academic context; off task behavior
